resources.string: Note: This allows for syncing with YouTube Music. This is NOT changeable later.
Display a looping video next to the artist name on the artist page
Display a looping motion art video behind the artist image
Download all songs for offline playback
Remove all downloaded songs from this playlist
Replace album artwork with app logo in player
Change the corner radius of the album cover thumbnail
Force a square aspect ratio by cropping video thumbnails
Show animated album covers when available
Enable a rotating thumbnail animation effect
If enabled, Adds up 5 extra seconds incrementally on each seek skip
The display density change will take effect after restarting the app. Do you want to restart now?
Swipe song to the left to add it to the queue or to the right to play it next
Swipe song to remove it from the playlist
Add glowing animation and bounce effect to active lyrics
Use Better Lyrics provider for word-by-word synced lyrics
Use SimpMusic Lyrics provider for synced lyrics
When shuffling, play all songs from the original playlist/album first, then similar content
When adding a track to queue, remove it from its previous position if already present
Fast forward through silent parts of songs
Jump ahead during silent moments instead of speeding up playback
Tap again to copy or edit

This is an ADVANCED login method. As an alternative to the web portal, you may directly enter or update your login token here. For example, this can speed up logging in on multiple devices. Please note that any invalid token formats the app fails to parse will not be accepted
Automatically sync with your YouTube Music account
Note: Your account must be linked to a phone number and verified on YouTube Music to change playlist cover.
After selecting an image, please wait a moment for the new cover to appear in your playlist.
Couldn\'t find app language settings, please configure them manually
Couldn\'t find supported links settings, please configure them manually
Drag to reorder which provider is tried first
Show song title prominently instead of artist names
Automatically add more similar songs when the end of the queue is reached
Keep shuffle enabled when starting new songs or playlists
Remember shuffle and repeat mode when restarting the app
The minimum amount of a song that must be played before it is considered \"played\"
Note: Adding local songs to synced/remote playlists is unsupported. Any other combination is valid
Automatically download songs when you like them
Adjust how sensitive swipe gestures are for changing songs
Are you sure you want to clear all cached songs?
Are you sure you want to clear all cached image?
Are you sure you want to clear all downloads?
Do you wish to keep every library and other thing?
Pause share listen history with YouTube Music
The requested playlist could not be loaded
This playlist doesn\'t contain any songs
Disable load more when repeat all
Don\'t auto load more songs and similar content when repeat all mode is enabled
Pause music when media is muted
Keep screen on when player is expanded
Don\'t crossfade if the album is gapless
Crossfade is a new feature and may have bugs. If you experience any issues, please report them.\n\nThis feature disables audio offload due to technical limitations.
EXPERIMENTAL: Detect language line by line
The Cyrillic language will be detected line by line instead of the entire song.

This is a hit or miss experimental feature. 

By default, language is determined from the whole song, but with this option on, it will be determined line by line instead. This will allow multi-language songs to work BUT the language might not always be correct (for example if there is a Ukrainian lyric that doesn't contain any Ukrainian-specific letters, it might be romanized as Russian instead). 

If you do not have issues, it is recommended to keep this option off.
Use the offload audio path for audio playback. Disabling this may increase power usage but can be useful if you experience issues with audio playback or post processing
Enable casting audio to Chromecast and other Cast-enabled devices
Love/Unlove songs in Last.fm when they are Liked/Unliked in echomusic
Create a station based on this item
Add to the top of your queue
Add to the bottom of your queue
Add to one of your playlists
Fetch the latest metadata from YouTube Music
Share a link to this item
Change the song\'s tempo and pitch
You\'ve chosen a cache size limit smaller than what the app is currently using (%1$s). If you continue, the app may remove some cached %2$s to match the new limit. Proceed anyway?
Apply blur to inactive lyrics lines for a premium focus effect
You\'ve listened to this album for %d minutes
Your top artist of the year is
You\'ve listened to them for %d minutes
it\'s time to see what you\'ve been listening to
Time to see what you loved this year.
Special thanks to echodh for creating echomusic
Are you sure you want to delete "%1$s"? This action cannot be undone.
Copy error info to help developers debug the issue
Music player widget with playback controls
Circular music widget with play and like controls
Fastest option. Direct stream URLs without signature decryption. Recommended for most users.
Slower but supports premium formats. Uses JavaScript signature decryption which adds ~5-10 seconds to playback start.
Official TeamNewPipe library. Most up-to-date with YouTube changes. Recommended as default. Automatic fallback to PipePipe API if fails.
API-based decryption using MetroExtractor. Faster but depends on external API. Automatic fallback to NewPipe if fails.
Listen to music with friends in real-time
Create a room and share the code with friends
Automatically approve join requests instead of reviewing them manually
Guests follow the host volume level
Show Listen Together in top app bar instead of navigation bar
Listen to music with your friends in real-time. Create a room to be the host or join an existing room with a code.
Note: You may get disconnected if you create a room while no music is playing and then switch to another app.
Listen Together is not configured. Please set up the server URL in Settings → Integrations → Listen Together.
Cannot edit username while in a room
Remove this person from the session
Block this person\'s join requests and hide their suggestions
Make this person the host of the room
Visit openrouter.ai for free and paid models
Visit deepl.com/pro-api for free and paid keys
An unexpected error occurred. Please share the crash report to help us fix the issue.
Force the display to run at the highest supported refresh rate (e.g. 120Hz)
Are you sure you want to clear all recognition history?
Hold search icon to recognize music

This feature uses the KizzyRPC library to connect to Discord\'s Gateway and set your Rich Presence status. While no known account suspensions have occurred from similar usage, this method is not officially supported by Discord and may be considered a Terms of Service violation. Your token is extracted locally and never sent to third-party servers. Proceed at your own discretion.
Sign in with Discord to share what you\'re listening to
Custom name for the activity (leave empty for default)
Show additional customization options for Rich Presence
Randomly reorder home screen sections with weighted priorities
No old releases with changelog found
Let\'s get everything ready for you.
These permissions are required for echomusic to function correctly. Please grant them to proceed.
Know immediately when your music is playing and control it from the notification bar.
Required to download and install app updates seamlessly.
Explore everything echomusic has to offer for your music journey.
Enjoy synchronized, word-by-word lyrics for millions of songs.
Download your favorite tracks and listen anywhere, anytime.
Always stay updated with our built-in updater.
Ensuring you have the latest features and security improvements.
Everything is now up to date
Failed to load commits becoz you didnt pay me ?
Browse recent changes on main branch
Dynamically it will be deleted after one day.
You can manually also delete. Deleting old apk will improve the updater to update properly.
View real-time stream resolution and bot mitigation events
Show a button to view comments in the player queue
Allow storage access to scan audio files stored on this device.
Play local songs on this device.
Refresh songs stored on this device and update the local library metadata.
Changes apply the next time you scan this device.
Skip songs shorter than the selected duration.
Skip songs stored in folders that match any of these paths.
Required to read your downloaded and local audio files for playback.
Open settings from the top bar and run a device scan to find offline audio on this device.
Try a different song, artist, or album name.
Identify songs playing around you directly from your home screen
Something went wrong. Please try again
Shows a notification while identifying a song from the widget
Recording audio to identify the song…
